notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with working split mechanics, UFO, waves, lives, and hi-score; minor code smell in wrap() with a syntax error (double assignment on one line) that doesn't crash but is sloppy, and bullet cap of 4 feels slightly restrictive, but overall plays well.

A solid and mostly complete Asteroids clone with working waves, splitting rocks, UFO, scoring, pause, and lives, but it lacks some classic polish and has minor design/code quirks that keep it well short of perfection.
